focus: small product features that reduce user friction

improvements.title: Create a reusable EmptyState component and use it for agent workspaces
improvements.why: Repeated empty states should feel intentional and guide the next action clearly.
acceptance: A reusable EmptyState UI component exists.
The dashboard agent empty state uses the shared component.
The call to action remains visible on mobile and desktop.

improvements.title: Upgrade integration empty states with provider-specific CTAs
improvements.why: When no store is connected, users need a direct next step, not only a passive message.
acceptance: WooCommerce and Shopify empty states include a clear action.
The action label names the provider.
The panel still works with existing connection summaries.

improvements.title: Improve button sizing and label stability on narrow screens
improvements.why: Buttons should not shift, clip, or feel inconsistent across dense SaaS panels.
acceptance: Icon and text alignment stays predictable.
